data.title: Hong Kong Sounds Alarm on Unapproved Digital Yuan Stablecoins Amid Market Surge
data.description:
The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has firmly denied social media rumours that the world’s first offshore yuan-pegged stablecoin has been issued in the city.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/hong-kong-sounds-alarm-on-unapproved-digital-yuan-stablecoins-amid-market-surge/

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Advocates Gradual Reduction in Restrictive Interest Rates
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Milan has expressed concerns about the current restrictive nature of interest rates, suggesting they are excessively high by 150-200 basis points. Milan advocates for a gradual reduction in these rates, proposing a decrease of 50 basis points at a time.

data.title: ‘Fusaka will fix this’: Vitalik Buterin unveils Ethereum’s scalability upgrade
data.description:
Are existing networks prepared for Ethereum’s next scaling leap?
source: https://ambcrypto.com/fusaka-will-fix-this-vitalik-buterin-unveils-ethereums-scalability-upgrade/

data.title: Binance Wealth will launch Aave-Plasma USDT fixed-term products
data.description: According to Binance's official announcement, following the completion of XPL rewards distribution for the Plasma USDT Term Product, Binance Wealth will launch the Aave-Plasma USDT Term Product on Binance Wealth Management at 8:00 PM (UTC) on September 25, 2025. This product is an upgrade for existing Plasma USDT Term Product users and is also open to new users. Current subscribers to the Plasma USDT Term Product will automatically be upgraded to the Aave-Plasma USDT Term Product at 8:00 PM (UTC) on September 25, 2025. Users can earn up to 7% annualized yield through the Aave protocol on the Plasma chain.

data.title: Ransomware Group Rhysida Auctions Stolen Maryland Transport Data
data.description: According to PANews, the ransomware group known as Rhysida has reportedly stolen sensitive data from the Maryland Department of Transportation in the United States. The group is auctioning the data for 30 bitcoins, which is approximately valued at $3.4 million.

data.title: Caliber Expands Digital Asset Holdings with Chainlink Acquisition
data.description: According to PANews, diversified real estate and digital asset management platform Caliber (NASDAQ: CWD) has announced a strategic acquisition of Chainlink (LINK) tokens valued at $4 million. This move is part of Caliber's ongoing efforts to enhance its Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) strategy. The company purchased 183,421 LINK tokens at an average price of $21.81 each, including fees and expenses. With this acquisition, Caliber's total holdings of LINK tokens have increased to 467,632, amounting to approximately $10.1 million.

data.title: American Bitcoin Appoints KPMG as Independent Auditor
data.description: According to Foresight News, American Bitcoin, a cryptocurrency mining company backed by the Trump family, has announced the appointment of KPMG as its independent auditor. KPMG will replace RBSM LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the company for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025.

data.title: OKX Wallet: An issue has occurred where incomplete balance display has occurred. This issue is being urgently addressed. User asset security is not affected.
data.description: According to official news, OKX Wallet has an incomplete display of asset balances and is undergoing emergency repairs. The security of user assets will not be affected.

data.title: Binance to List Mira (MIRA) With HODLer Airdrops for BNB Holders
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance introduces Mira (MIRA) as the 45th project on its HODLer Airdrops page.20M MIRA (2% of supply) will be distributed to BNB holders via retroactive Simple Earn and On-Chain Yields subscriptions.Trading opens Sept. 26, 2025, 12:00 UTC with USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY pairs.Initial circulating supply: 191.24M MIRA (~19.12% of total).Binance has announced that it will list Mira (MIRA) — a project building a trust layer for AI — on September 26, 2025, at 12:00 UTC. The token will debut with trading pairs against USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY, and deposits will open a day earlier, on September 25, 12:00 UTC.MIRA HODLer AirdropAs part of the listing, Binance will reward BNB holders through its HODLer Airdrops program. Eligible users who subscribed their BNB to Simple Earn (Flexible or Locked) or On-Chain Yields between Sept. 20–22 (UTC) will receive 20 million MIRA tokens, representing 2% of total supply.Rewards will be distributed to users’ spot accounts at least one hour before trading begins.Binance will also allocate an additional 10 million MIRA for future marketing campaigns, expected three months after listing.Tokenomics and DistributionToken Name: Mira (MIRA)Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 MIRACirculating Supply at Listing: 191,244,643 MIRA (~19.12%)HODLer Airdrops Allocation: 20,000,000 MIRA (2%)Smart Contracts:BNB Smart Chain: 0x7839Fbfd09DaE4d0F15BfB36b8f16f7898FBE684Base Chain: 0x7AaFD31a321d3627b30A8e2171264B56852187feListing Fee: 0About Binance HODLer AirdropsThe HODLer Airdrops program rewards BNB holders based on historical snapshots of their balances. By subscribing BNB to Simple Earn or On-Chain Yields, users automatically qualify for airdrops, without needing to take ongoing actions.

data.title: XPL rose to 0.84 USDT in pre-market trading, a 15% increase on the day.
data.description: Market data shows that XPL rose to 0.84 USDT before the market opened, with a daily increase of 15%, and is currently quoted at 0.83 USDT.

data.title: Binance is assisting the GriffinAI (GAIN) team with a review of the hack and developing a compensation plan.
data.description: According to an official Binance announcement, GriffinAI (GAIN) has confirmed it was recently hacked and is currently investigating the technical details. To protect user rights, the project has immediately removed GAIN's official on-chain liquidity from BNB Chain. Binance is assisting the project team with a review and compensation plan, and will continue to provide updates.

data.title: Ripple’s (XRP) Cycle Pattern Signals $15–$33 Ahead by 2025: Analyst
data.description:
Analysts see XRP building a familiar cycle setup, with key supports holding and long-term targets between $15 and $33.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/ripples-xrp-cycle-pattern-signals-15-33-ahead-by-2025-analyst/

data.title: Aethir launches low-latency media transmission engine libyxrtc
data.description: Aethir has announced the release of libyxrtc, a high-performance media transport engine designed for ultra-low latency. This engine is designed to enable developers to build efficient, low-latency, and high-quality audio and video acceleration solutions, particularly for gaming applications. The project is now open source and available on GitHub.

data.title: Binance HODLer Airdrop Now Available: Mira (MIRA), the 45th Project
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance HODLer Airdrop has launched its 45th project – Mira (MIRA), a trust layer for AI. Users who subscribe to guaranteed principal earning (fixed and/or demand) or on-chain earning products with BNB between 08:00 on September 20, 2025, and 07:59 on September 23, 2025 (GMT+8) will receive the airdrop. HODLer airdrop information is expected to be available within 24 hours, and the new tokens will be distributed to users' spot wallets at least one hour before trading begins. Binance will list MIRA at 20:00 on September 26, 2025 (GMT+8) and open trading against USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY. Seed tag trading rules apply. The MIRA deposit channel will be open at 20:00 on September 25, 2025 (GMT+8).

data.title: Binance to Launch SHIB Token Voucher Campaign for South Asia Users
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch an exclusive campaign targeting users in South Asia, offering a chance to share 1.6 billion SHIB in token voucher rewards. This promotion will run from 2025-09-25 09:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-24 23:59 (UTC). Eligible participants include verified users from South Asia who have not engaged in trading on Binance's Spot, Futures, Convert, or Margin platforms in the 30 days leading up to 2025-09-24 23:59 (UTC).

To participate, users must complete identity verification (KYC) and register for the promotion. The first 16,000 users to complete a Binance Convert trade and accumulate a trading volume of at least $10 or its equivalent on select trading pairs will receive 100,000 SHIB in token vouchers on a first-come, first-served basis. However, certain trading pairs are excluded from the Convert trade task, including TUSDUSDT, FDUSDUSDT, and others.

The SHIB token voucher rewards will be distributed within 48 hours after successful completion of the required tasks. Users can redeem their rewards via the Profile > Rewards Hub section on Binance. The vouchers will remain valid for 30 days post-distribution, and eligible users must claim them before expiration.

Binance emphasizes that SHIB tokens are included in this promotion without endorsement or recommendation. The platform reserves the right to disqualify participants engaging in fraudulent activities or tampering with the program. Additionally, Binance may amend the terms and conditions of the promotion due to regulatory changes, legal obligations, or technical issues. Users are advised to stay informed about any restrictions related to accessing Binance services in their respective countries.

data.title: Significant ETH Short Positions Opened Amid Market Activity
data.description: According to BlockBeats, HyperInsight monitoring has revealed that in the past five hours, an address beginning with 0xa52 has opened 25x ETH short positions, increasing its holdings by 2,998 ETH, valued at approximately $12.062 million. Additionally, the address has placed ETH long orders totaling 3,000 ETH within the price range of $3,899 to $3,966. Further monitoring indicates that the total holdings of this address amount to approximately $54.76 million, with major positions including BTC long positions worth $22.366 million and ETH short positions valued at $12.117 million.

data.title: Deribit Q3 options delivery notional value will reach $23 billion, a record high
data.description: Deribit announced on its X platform that it will see its largest-ever Q3 options delivery this Friday, with a total notional value of approximately $23 billion. The delivery positions are primarily concentrated in Bitcoin put options between $95,000 and $110,000, as well as open interest in Ethereum contracts above $4,000.

data.title: MyStonks officially changed its name to msx.com, with a comprehensive brand upgrade
data.description: On September 23rd, the MyStonks platform announced a brand upgrade, officially changing its domain name to msx.com, marking its entry into a new era of global fintech. The announcement stated that this upgrade not only simplifies access and facilitates user connectivity, but also demonstrates the platform's transformation from a meme-based platform to a professional international financial brand, demonstrating its commitment to digital financial innovation and global expansion. The msx.com team stated that it will continue to prioritize users, drive technological innovation, and enhance the security and efficiency of digital financial services.

data.title: Bitcoin's Correlation with Global M2 Supply Faces Disruption
data.description:
According to PANews, Global Macro Investor founder Raoul Pal has observed a notable shift in the correlation between Bitcoin's price movements and the global M2 money supply. Since the beginning of 2023, Bitcoin's price has shown a lagging correlation of approximately 12 weeks with global M2, indicating that liquidity takes about three months to impact the cryptocurrency market. However, this pattern has changed since July 16. Despite the continued expansion of global M2, Bitcoin has remained in a sideways trading pattern.

Pal attributes this divergence to the U.S. Treasury's liquidity withdrawal through the Treasury General Account (TGA). Since July, the U.S. Treasury has issued around $500 billion in bonds to replenish the TGA, raising its balance to nearly $800 billion. This action has reduced available market funds, directly affecting liquidity-sensitive assets like Bitcoin.

Pal suggests that the TGA account is now nearing its target level, and the liquidity withdrawal effect may dissipate by the end of the month. This could potentially allow Bitcoin to resume its upward trend in sync with the M2 supply. Meanwhile, technology stocks and gold continue to reach new highs, indicating that overall risk appetite remains largely unaffected. Additionally, the selling pressure from long-term holders might also be contributing to the divergence between Bitcoin and the M2 supply.

data.title: A newly created address recently increased its holdings by 1,524 BTC, worth approximately $171 million.
data.description: According to lookonchain monitoring, a newly created wallet 1F1neJ withdrew 1,524 bitcoins (about $171 million) from the trading platform in the past three days.
